rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing invalid syntax
Preserve existing architecture and only modify the annex to address the diagnostic
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope when repairing AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Add missing annex blocks when the diagnostic indicates an EOF error
Ensure all AGREE contracts are properly enclosed within annex agree blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for const and eq declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed within annex agree blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for const and eq declarations
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-level references in component type contracts
Do not leave unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics not related to the current diagnostic context
